pages.text: Unlike simple reactors, these advanced reactors are free-form multiblocks. You must build a structural casing and fill the interior with functional components.$(br2)Components include Fuel Channels, Moderators, Control Channels, and Coolant Channels.

The $(l:unnamednuclear:reactor_controller)Reactor Controller$(/l) must be placed on the outer surface of the casing. It manages the simulation and fluid exchange.$(br2)Hot coolant is produced which must then be sent to a Heat Exchanger.
